1120701.name: Bullets are Pricey
1120701.desc:
- On Heads Hit against target with [Laceration], gain Unjust Enrichment. (Max 4)
- If this unit Critical Hits when out of [Bullet], spend all Unjust Enrichment and deal additional (5 x Unjust Enrichment consumed)% of damage dealt as bonus damage.

1120702.name: Bullets are Pricey
1120702.desc:
- Always Active : begin encounters with 7 [Bullet]
- On Heads Hit against target with [Laceration], gain Unjust Enrichment. (Max 4)
 If a Coin that uses [Bullet] Hits, consume all Unjust Enrichment and deal additional (25 x Unjust Enrichment consumed)% of damage as bonus damage.
- If this unit Critical Hits when out of [Bullet], consume all Unjust Enrichment and deal additional (5 x Unjust Enrichment consumed)% of damage dealt as bonus damage.

1120721.name: New Breathing Hole
1120721.desc: If 1 ally with the most [Breath] defeats an enemy, gain 1 [PenetrateDamageUp] next turn. (Once per turn)
